zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Umfraville於大約1390年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德時，她的父親Sir Thomas Umfraville II31歲，母親Agnes Grey27歲。她於大約1420年與Thomas Haggerston結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1446年之後在英國英格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Umfraville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Umfreville (La Manche) or Offranville (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Umfraville was born about 1390, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Thomas Umfraville II, was 31 and her mother, Agnes Grey, was 27. She married Thomas Haggerston about 1420. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 1446, in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Umfraville est née environ 1390, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Umfraville II, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Agnes Grey, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Haggerston environ 1420. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 1446, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lei sposato Thomas Haggerston circa 1420. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1446, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Umfravilleが約1390年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Umfraville IIは31歳，母Agnes Greyは27歳であった。約1420年にThomas Haggerstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1446年以後にイギリスイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Umfraville(이)가 대략 1390년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Umfraville II(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Grey(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1420년 Thomas Haggerston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1446년 이후 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Umfraville родилась около 1390 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Umfraville II было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes Grey, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Haggerston около 1420 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 1446 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания.
